description_long: This bungalow features a sprawling single-story layout with a light-colored hip roof and a combination of brick and white exterior walls. The front facade is adorned with a covered entryway, flanked by symmetrical windows and a double garage on one side. The rear of the house opens to a spacious patio area with outdoor seating and a swimming pool, enclosed by a wooden fence for privacy. Large glass windows and a sunroom extension provide ample natural light and views of the backyard. The property is landscaped with palm trees and green lawns, enhancing its suburban appeal. The overall design is modern yet classic, with clean lines and a focus on outdoor living.
description: A modern single-story bungalow with a hip roof, large windows, a sunroom, and a backyard pool, surrounded by palm trees and a wooden fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, double garage, symmetrical windows, and landscaped lawn with palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the hip roof structure, sunroom extension, and the row of palm trees along the lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio, swimming pool, outdoor seating area, and the wooden privacy fence.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the side lawn, fenced backyard, and the connection between the garage and main living areas.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side and rear windows
